blended.narrative: Castle Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 45 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 23" of heavy snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
